title: Student Service Associate (Part Time) - 6 Months Contract
description:
DAS Student Service Associates play a critical function as they are the main interface with our parents. The Virtual Administration team manages the customer service, facilities management and the management of the learning centres virtually.


Successful candidates will be offered a 6-months contract, with an hourly rate of $12.00, subject to relevant work experience.


Job Description

  • Handling all centre administration matters at Bedok Learning Centre
  • Liaison with Feng Shan Primary School on behalf of DAS
  • Support the educational therapists, students, parents at Bedok Learning Centre in administration matters
  • Supports the virtual management team for incoming telephone calls and enquiries and refers to the team leads / Centre Manager(s) where necessary.
  • Supports the virtual management team to provide surveillance support to ensure the safety and security of students and colleagues
  • Providing virtual administrative support to various stakeholders while working remotely from Bedok Learning Centre.
  • Supports the team in administrative paperwork needed within the work scope of the team’s functions.
  • Assist to call the parents and schedule the students on the waitlist for all profiling sessions.

Requirements

  • Diploma holders or with proven administrative and virtual assistant are preferred.
  • Candidates with direct relevant experience are welcomed to apply
  • Fresh Grads are welcomed to apply
  • Ability to work flexible hours (including weekends)
  • Ability to multi-task and adapt to changing work environment
  • Familiar with Microsoft Office applications and database software
  • Proficiency in Mandarin an advantage as we have clients who speak Mandarin only

Working Locations

Successful candidates will be based at Bedok Learning Centre & Toa Payoh Administration Block


Working Hours

Work Schedule: Up to 5 Days a Week

During Term Time:

  • Tuesdays to Fridays: 1pm - 6.30pm
  • Saturdays: 8.30am - 1pm

During Term Breaks:

  • Mondays to Fridays: 12.30pm - 6pm

Application Details

All interested applicants are to submit the following as part of their application

  1. DAS Employment Application Form, duly completed (form can be downloaded from the Careers page of our website - https://das.org.sg/careers-at-das/positions-available/)
  2. Resume

Email the above submissions to jobs@das.org.sg

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Dyslexia Association of Singapore Limited (DAS) is a vibrant social service organisation with over 250 full-time staff, providing a wide array of services for individuals with dyslexia and other specific learning differences. Our clients are from Singapore and the region.


As a one-stop centre, DAS’ services include providing psychological assessment services for individuals at risk of having dyslexia and specific learning differences, and providing educational programmes and other support services for individuals with dyslexia and specific learning differences. 


DAS have 14 learning centres around Singapore, serving over 3,000 children ranging from pre-schoolers to secondary school students. Our workforce is composed of a multi-disciplinary team of Psychologists, Speech-Language Therapists and Educational Therapists. This group integrates with the team of lecturers, marketing and operations teams to educate professionals, teachers and parents on dyslexia and how to support a dyslexic child. This approach ensures that the physical, social, psychological, emotional and even financial needs of the DAS students are looked into.


In addition, DAS is continuously raising public and professional awareness of the nature and incidence of dyslexia and specific learning differences.
postedCompany.name: DYSLEXIA ASSOCIATION OF SINGAPORE
